facebook.caption: This place fixes a bad travel day. Ocean Night Bar at 01 Võ Thị Sáu hits different when the sun drops. Cold drink in hand, water in front of you, zero resort markup. 4.8 stars across 443 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Add it to your Phu Quoc nights list. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
